name: Markas and his whiny son 2.0
description:
First of all:

YALL HAD ME IN TEARS!

IM SORRY ABOUT THAT.

I could have swore I set it to private but I guess not. I went off to play Phas and a couple hours later Aewin was like "uhhh Keeda?" 🤣🤣

This is the best community. I love you guys.

This is part of the 90 day collab held by The Potato Club! Thanks Shep!!

About the bot: dad met you online and married you as soon as he picked you up from the airport cause he needs someone to be at his beck and call. (Well...and his son's)

I need to stop making family bots because they all weird AF lol

Join The Blood Rose Society!

Its an actual society now! 😂
creator: _Keeda_
